text: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS) Eligibility Criteria for Startups: 1. DPIIT Recognition: Must be recognized by DPIIT. 2. Incorporation Age: Not more than 2 years old at application. 3. Business Model: Must have a viable commercialization plan and scope for scaling. 4. Technology Usage: Must use technology in core product or delivery. 5. Shareholding: Indian promoters must hold at least 51%. 6. Prior Funding: Must not have received >₹10 lakh government support previously.

Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS) Benefits: 1. Grant: Up to ₹20 Lakhs for proof of concept, prototype development, or product trials. 2. Investment: Up to ₹50 Lakhs for market entry, commercialization, or scaling up through debt or debt-linked instruments. The scheme is sector-agnostic with priority for innovative solutions in social impact, agriculture, healthcare, and energy.

SISFS Application Process: 1. Apply online via the Startup India portal (https://www.startupindia.gov.in/). 2. Use DPIIT recognition credentials to login. 3. Select up to three incubators simultaneously for fund application. 4. Fill form and submit; no physical documents required. Required Documents: DPIIT Recognition Certificate, Proof of Incorporation, Business Plan, and Financial Statements (if applicable).
